case_title: JOHN P SPAGNOLO VS. GLOBAL OCEAN FREIGHT, INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GLOBAL OCEAN FREIGHT, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SPAGNOLO, JOHN P AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL OCEAN FREIGHT, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL OCEAN FREIGHT, INC
RECEIVED FROM DEFT (PER COMMISSIONER'S INSTRUCTION) DOCUMENTS PERTAINING TO SHIPMENT FROM U.S. TO COSTA RICA.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2008 - CONTINUED TO JUL-31-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT WILL HOLD THIS CASE UNDER SUBMISSION UNTIL JULY 31, 2008, TO ALLOW THE PARTIES TO DISCUSS SETTLEMENT, AS MENTIONED IN PLAINTIFF'S LETTER OF JUNE 30, 2008. IF THE PARTIES RESOLVE THIS CASE BEFORE THAT DATE, THEY SHALL NOTIFY THE COURT, AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED. IF THE CASE HAS NOT BEEN SETTLED BY JULY 31, 2008, THE COURT WILL ISSUE ITS JUDGMENT. NO FURTHER APPEARANCE REQUIRED BY THE PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED IN FILE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2008 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-03-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPAGNOLO, JOHN P IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GLOBAL OCEAN FREIGHT, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURN OF CONTINUANCE ORDER - SENT TO GLOBAL OCEAN FREIGHT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE SUBMITTED. NO APPEARANCES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
